title: GoC G9B per-cell score deltas (Level B)
description: Differences between two independent evaluators on the same six-scenario matrix. Level A: leave not_applicable true or omit file.

not_applicable_level_a.description: True when only one evaluator scored (Level A); delta grid must still not be replaced by reconciliation prose.

per_cell_delta.description: Keys: scenario_id. Values: object mapping criterion name to (score_a - score_b) or structured delta.

disagreement_summary.description: Optional additive summary (nonzero cells, counts). Must not replace or substitute for per_cell_delta.

note.description: Optional human-readable semantics (e.g. score_a minus score_b).
